corrections.text: The article states that 'the optical communications terminal supplier Mynaric, whose closing Rocket Lab executives described as "progressing well" toward later this year, [SpaceNews] reports.' The term 'Mynaric' does not appear in the SpaceNews source snapshot (or in any of the article's other four cited sources). The Mynaric acquisition is widely reported elsewhere in industry coverage, but the SpaceNews attribution cannot be verified against the local snapshot. Readers should treat the Mynaric claim as unverified relative to the article's source set.
